summary: Video Showroom feature fully tested. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend admin panel and customer-facing component verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for video showroom fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video Showroom feature is fully implemented and working. Backend endpoints: PUT/GET /api/website-admin/homepage for video_showroom_* fields, POST /api/website-admin/homepage/upload-video for video uploads (max 200MB, MP4/WebM/MOV), POST /api/website-admin/homepage/upload-thumbnail for thumbnail uploads (max 10MB, JPEG/PNG/WebP), GET /api/website-admin/homepage/media/{path} for serving uploaded media. Frontend admin: Video Showroom section in HomepageManager sidebar with visibility toggle, video upload, thumbnail upload, text fields, stats editor, and floating badge fields. Customer-facing: VideoShowroom component on homepage loads data dynamically from API and respects video_showroom_visible toggle.

backend_api: ✓ Deep merge preserves existing data (brand_marquee not affected)
✓ POST /api/website-admin/homepage/upload-video accepts MP4/WebM/MOV files up to 200MB
✓ POST /api/website-admin/homepage/upload-thumbnail accepts JPEG/PNG/WebP files up to 10MB
✓ Homepage content accessible publicly for customer-facing components
frontend_admin: ✓ Video Showroom section appears in HomepageManager sidebar
✓ Clicking 'Video Showroom' shows editor with all required fields
✓ Text content section with badge, title, description inputs present
✓ Save Changes button (data-testid='save-video-showroom') persists all fields
frontend_customer: ✓ Badge text displays correctly from API
✓ Stats section displays correctly with values from API
✓ Floating badge displays title and subtitle from API
✓ When video_showroom_visible=false, section does NOT render
